title: LinkedIn Message Sync - Input Schema
description: Provides the necessary credentials and settings to sync LinkedIn messages.

cookieString.title: Full LinkedIn Cookie String
cookieString.description: The complete cookie string from your logged-in LinkedIn session. Go to linkedin.com/messaging, open Developer Tools (F12), go to Application -> Cookies -> linkedin.com, and click 'Copy All'.

accountOwnerUrl.title: Account Owner LinkedIn Profile URL
accountOwnerUrl.description: The URL of your own LinkedIn profile. This is used to distinguish your messages from replies.

proxy.title: Proxy Configuration
proxy.description: Optional: Configure a proxy to be used for requests. If you have a list of specific proxy URLs, use the 'proxyUrls' property.
